messages.content:
Analyze the following PlantUML use case model and detect if it contains any antipatterns. Base your analysis solely on the model provided. Do not use any outside knowledge. Respond with a JSON object.

PlantUML Model:
@startuml
left to right direction

actor "Public User" as PublicUser
actor "Research User" as ResearchUser
actor "ArcIMC Administrator" as ArcIMCAdmin
actor "Database Administrator" as DBAdmin
actor "Geocoder" as Geocoder
actor "Database Integrator" as DBIntegrator
actor "Data Editor" as DataEditor

rectangle MAPSTEDI {
  usecase "Download Collections Data" as UC_Download
  usecase "Search Collections Data" as UC_Search
  usecase "Visualize Biodiversity Analysis" as UC_Visualize
  usecase "Access Sensitive Data" as UC_AccessSensitive
  usecase "Backup Process" as UC_Backup
  usecase "Restore Process" as UC_Restore
  usecase "Install Software Updates" as UC_Install
  usecase "RunQC Tests" as UC_RunQC
  usecase "Query Remote Database" as UC_QueryRemote
  usecase "Upload DBG and UCOM Data" as UC_Upload
  usecase "Integrate Query Results" as UC_Integrate
  usecase "Query Local Database" as UC_QueryLocal
  usecase "Edit Collections Data" as UC_Edit
  usecase "Update Collections Data" as UC_Update
  usecase "Geocode Specimen" as UC_Geocode
  usecase "Find Locality" as UC_FindLocality
}

PublicUser -- UC_Download
PublicUser -- UC_Search
PublicUser -- UC_Visualize

ResearchUser -- UC_Download
ResearchUser -- UC_Search
ResearchUser -- UC_Visualize
ResearchUser -- UC_AccessSensitive

ArcIMCAdmin -- UC_Backup
ArcIMCAdmin -- UC_Restore
ArcIMCAdmin -- UC_Install

DBAdmin -- UC_Backup
DBAdmin -- UC_Restore
DBAdmin -- UC_Install

DBIntegrator -- UC_Integrate
DBIntegrator -- UC_Update
DBIntegrator -- UC_Edit

Geocoder -- UC_Geocode
DataEditor -- UC_Edit

UC_Download ..> UC_Search : <<include>>
UC_Integrate ..> UC_QueryLocal : <<include>>
UC_Integrate ..> UC_QueryRemote : <<include>>
UC_Update ..> UC_Edit : <<include>>
UC_Update ..> UC_RunQC : <<include>>
UC_RunQC ..> UC_QueryRemote : <<include>>
UC_RunQC ..> UC_Upload : <<include>>
UC_Edit ..> UC_Geocode : <<extend>>
UC_Geocode ..> UC_FindLocality : <<include>>
@enduml
